title: 10 Herbal Creams For Hematuria
description: Aloe barbadensis creams contains bioactive constituents such as aloin, aloe-emodin, and anthraquinones. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and irritation in the urinary tract, a common cause of hematuria. The anthraquinones also have a natural antiseptic effect, which can help prevent infections in the urinary tract, further contributing to the reduction of hematuria.
